programme.desc: The journalist explores social issues of the Philippines with personal stories of its people.

programme.title: Haunted Mansion
programme.desc: A girl who has the ability to see ghosts spends the night in a haunted mansion with her classmates.

programme.title: Just the 3 of Us
programme.desc: Two unlikely strangers find love as unforeseen circumstances force them to live under the same roof.

programme.title: Pa- Siyam
programme.desc: Five children return to perform the funeral rite pasiyam for their deceased mother. Their belief that she died of natural causes is challenged when eerie supernatural events occur in the house.

programme.title: Trip
programme.desc: A mother becomes an alcoholic recluse after the suicide of her mentally ill daughter, and is visited by an unconventional therapist who offers a hallucinogenic drug that will allow communion with the dead.

programme.title: Huwag Mong Ubusin Ang Bait Ko!
programme.desc: Rolando, an honest and tough policeman, makes it a point to bring criminals to justice despite the power of corrupt officials.

programme.title: Mano po III: My Love
programme.desc: Lilia seems to have the perfect home life and career until a chance meeting with her first love sends her life into chaos.

programme.title: Starzan III
programme.desc: Tarzan and Jane are excited about having a child soon, but an unexpected enemy emerges to squash their happiness.

programme.title: Gawa Na Ang Bala Para Sa Akin
programme.desc: Nanding decides to hire a hit man for himself when he is diagnosed with a chronic illness. However, he later discovers that it had been a misdiagnosis and that he must stop his killer.

programme.title: Oops...Teka Lang Diskarte Ko 'To
programme.desc: A 2001 Filipino action comedy movie starring Robin Padilla.

programme.title: Bahala Na vs. Sputnik
programme.desc: Junior Bahala and Boy Sputnik, two gang leaders, meet in jail and begin a power struggle among the gang members. They do everything to get rid of each other and ensure supremacy.

programme.title: Sinungaling Mong Puso
programme.desc: Jason, a young man who is dissatisfied with his marriage, has a passionate affair with Clara, an older woman. Their tryst eventually becomes proof that love makes people do strange and unexpected things.

programme.title: Siargao
programme.desc: Laura and Diego are two strangers who travel to Siargao to recover from setbacks in their respective relationships. They connect and realize different things about love and themselves.

programme.title: Impakto
programme.desc: Doray encounters strange events after accepting a babysitting job for Dr Sagrado's family. Things take a turn when she discovers the child she is watching over is a demon.

programme.title: Oops...Teka Lang Diskarte Ko 'To
programme.desc: A 2001 Filipino action comedy movie starring Robin Padilla.

programme.title: The Heiress
programme.desc: The Heiress gathers global legends like La Llorona and Mothman, validating their eerie existence.

programme.title: Best Friends
programme.desc: Childhood best friends Ferry (Huub Smit) and Robert (Martijn Crins), now office colleagues, face the greatest challenge to their friendship yet when one of them begins to transform into a zombie.

programme.title: Kahit Mabuhay Kang Muli
programme.desc: A policeman juggles his life between fighting crime and pursuing the woman he loves. However, their lives become endangered when they face a dangerous group of criminals.

programme.title: Bahay kubo
programme.desc: A woman (Maricel Soriano) opens her heart and home to six orphaned children, despite the fact that she already has a daughter (Shaina Magdayao) of her own.

programme.title: Katabi Ko'y Mamaw
programme.desc: Two travelers arrive at a haunted house where a family was killed many years ago. They decide to try to help the spirits find rest.

programme.title: Isprikitik: Walastik Kung Pumitik
programme.desc: A comedy directed by Efren Jarlego, featuring Redford White.

programme.title: Daddy O! Baby O!
programme.desc: Mario (Dolphy) takes in his friend's child (Serena Dalrymple) to fulfill a dying wish. His conscientious attitudes clash with the girl's spunky personality as they set out to find her affluent mother.

programme.title: Tisay
programme.desc: In the world of semi-pro basketball, a beautiful bookie recruits a promising player to the underworld of game-fixing.

programme.title: The B Side
programme.desc: The host leads conversations exploring current trends in sports, fashion and entertainment; she delves into diverse aspects of popular culture with leading personalities.

programme.title: Exes Baggage
programme.desc: A loner falls for a rebel who fights for what she believes in.

programme.desc: Oscar® winner Ben Affleck is Jack Cunningham, a man who faces his inner demons by agreeing to coach a high school basketball team.

programme.title: Minions
programme.desc: Follow the minion trio as they venture out into the world to find a new evil boss for their brethren to follow.

programme.title: Hollywood On Set S1
programme.desc: Each week Hollywood On Set goes behind-the-scenes on three major movies in production, featuring action footage and interviews with filmmakers.

programme.title: Smurfs
programme.desc: Smurfette and the Smurfs team up with new friends to save Papa Smurf after he's kidnapped and realize their destiny is to protect the universe.

programme.title: Pacific Rim
programme.desc: A sci-fi action epic about a ragtag band of humans coming together in the year 2020 to fight legions of monstrous creatures rising from the sea.

programme.title: Ghost Town
programme.desc: Bertram Pincus dies for seven minutes and when he wakes up, has the ability to see ghosts. Stars Ricky Gervais and Greg Kinnear.

programme.title: Monster Trucks

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders
programme.desc: After Burple and Cutter crash-land in a village of tiny dragons, Burple's unintentional act of courage leads the locals to crown him as their king.

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders
programme.desc: Magnus's superpowered mechano-dragon threatens to replace the Riders. But when it spirals out of control, the town's real heroes have to step up!

programme.title: The Mr. Peabody and Sherman Show
programme.desc: Peabody's non-talking dog parents arrive for an unexpected visit; Galileo makes the world go dark when he crashes his spaceship and breaks the sun.

programme.title: The Mr. Peabody and Sherman Show
programme.desc: Sherman's scout troop, the Laser Robot Tiger Troopers, earn their merit badges on the show; Mark Twain's gift for gab wins back his lucky typewriter.

programme.title: Dragons 9 Realms S2
programme.desc: Jun forms an unlikely connection with Sledkin.

programme.title: Dragons 9 Realms S2
programme.desc: Eugene’s bond with Webmaster is put to the test when Webmaster leaves the group for a pack of Deathgrippers.

programme.title: All Hail King Julien
programme.desc: Tired of waiting so long for his meals, King Julien introduces “fast food” to the kingdom, but the side effects are not what he expected.

programme.title: All Hail King Julien
programme.desc: When King Julien thinks he's a crime victim, he buys the village self-defense scorpions from a shady dealer, leaving everyone armed and dangerous.

programme.title: The Adventures of Puss in Boots
programme.desc: Jack Sprat steals enchanted boots from the Treasure House and triggers a dangerous Devil Wind that threatens to consume San Lorenzo's treasure.

programme.title: The Adventures of Puss in Boots
programme.desc: Dulcinea pulls a magical sword from a stone and becomes enchanted with heroic powers; Puss must help her learn how to control her newfound strength.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: The Defenders of the Wing are a local island tribe, which worships dragons and believe the Riders have stolen their protector – the Eruptodon dragon.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: Hiccup, Mala, Astrid, Fishlegs, and Snotlout go searching for the now captured Eruptodon, but little do they know that Viggo has a sinister plan.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: When a distant cousin of the Twins named Gruffnut arrives on Dragon's Edge, Tuffnut tries to impress him, but Gruffnut may not be the hero he seems.

programme.title: The Croods Family Tree
programme.desc: While the parents are away, the kids are in charge of the tree house, but when the punch monkeys invade the house, the kids find themselves out of their element.

programme.title: The Croods Family Tree
programme.desc: Jealous of the Thunder Sisters, the men on the farm undergo a series of difficult initiation rituals to try and join the exclusive tribe of women.

programme.title: The Croods Family Tree
programme.desc: Eep loves action and adventure - it's in her blood. But when Eep starts adventuring in her sleep, she has to try to find the cause of her new sleep walking to avoid ending up in dangerous situations.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: When Bootsy's plan of 6 strategically placed kittens brings the whole town down, Mega Fat is forced to team with Boss Baby

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: When Grandma Templeton comes to stay, she forces Boss Baby into Tim's room but they struggle to be roommates, and meanwhile, Baby Corp's new CEO trusts Boss Baby with the new Stinkless Serum

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: Convinced old people are the new enemy, Boss Baby uses Tim to create havoc at the senior center, but a war soon begins when the seniors rally against babies

programme.title: Dragons 9 Realms
programme.desc: Tom and the riders help Thunder, who is seeking revenge against the dragons that chased off his family.

programme.title: Dragons 9 Realms
programme.desc: Tom hatches an unorthodox plan to use a monstrous Nightmare to test Alex’s new fire suits that endangers the secret of dragons.

programme.title: Dragons 9 Realms
programme.desc: After a fight with her mom, Jun joins Tom on an adventure into the Fire Realm, where the knowledge of myths saves the day.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: The team plans a heist in order to obtain the enchanted pendant that can lead them to the storm wheels. Elsewhere, Klaus and Veruca shipwreck on a mysterious island that is actually home to the mages, and also the Tianshang weapon helmet.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: Po and the team have one last attempt to get the pendant, but they will have to disrupt Jayesh's wedding, and contend with his guards, to do so. At the mage island, Klaus and Veruca get hold of the Tianshang helmet.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: Mr. Ping is possessed by the ghost of Master Mastodon, the ancient master sworn to protect the Tianshang storm wheels. After a ghostly sewer chase, Mastodon agrees to help our team to stop Klaus and Veruca. He reveals that their next step is to go across the sea to Central America.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Now broken out of mind control, Layla goes undercover with the gang, hiding the fact that she’s no longer being controlled. The crew is shocked to discover that revered martyr Rafaela Moreno is still alive and is the mastermind behind the mind control plot. Rafaela puts Layla’s driving to the test in a wild race against a mystery driver, then takes the rest of the crew hostage just days before Rafaela's dastardly plot.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Now in Rafaela’s custody, the crew works together to break Echo out to retrieve the hauler. Echo makes it into the jungle and must battle a mind-controlled Ms. Nowhere using everything she’s learned about spying and survival from the very woman who's out to get her. Meanwhile, Rafaela enlists Frostee to help her develop a non-exploding version of the mind control formula before her plan goes into motion at the favela race.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Echo and Ms. Nowhere bust Cisco, Frostee, and Gary out of their cell. But Rafaela has already mind controlled Tony and Layla and taken them to drive for her in the favela race, allowing her to release her mind control formula on the crowd!

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: Jim must surrender to Bular and unlock the Killahead Bridge to save kidnapped Blinky and promises Claire that he will get her brother back.

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: Jim yearns to save Claires brother Meanwhile Strickler takes a field trip to find help in his quest for power

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: Jim is nominated for Spring Fling King Meanwhile Strickler brings Angor Rot to Arcadia so the Troll assassin can meet his prey.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: When Omen hijacks the Mothership and Royal Cores, all seems lost for our heroes. The Royal heirs are able to defeat the killer Blank, but at a high cost.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: After last season’s victory, Aja and Krel struggle to relocate Mothership back to their Arcadia Oaks neighborhood, but their task is complicated when Toby and Eli discover the Royals’ Akiridion secret.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: Aja and Krel hitch a ride in Stuart’s old UFO on a mission to rescue Vex from a bounty hunter outpost on the Moon. Meanwhile, Zadra receives intel about Morando from a surprising new ally.

programme.title: Voltron: Legendary Defender
programme.desc: The Paladins face the most epic battle yet

programme.title: Dawn of the Croods
programme.desc: Thunk babysits Sandy and new baby Cliff to prove his responsible. Cliff is a jerk and keeps getting Sandy in trouble/Gran worries that Thunk isn't tough enough to survive to adulthood because he likes to hang out with old people, so she puts him through a series of toughness tests.

programme.title: Dawn of the Croods
programme.desc: When the adults come down with the sneezles, the kids (including Lerk and Womp) use the chance to create their own society ("you-topia") with no rules, but Eep and Thunk disagree on how to run it/Food is scarce and when a large egg is spotted on the hunting field, Grug, Eep, Snoot, Munk and Squawk call dibbs. It's decided that whoever is tough enough to be the last holding on, wins the food.

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free
programme.desc: Luckys buttons are pushed when her seemingly perfect cousin Julian comes to visit but reveals himself to be a junior con man

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free
programme.desc: Lucky takes part in a secret Miradero tradition a nighttime scavenger hunt

programme.title: Dinotrux
programme.desc: Garby and Click-Clack must rescue the Dinotruxafter they are tied down by a destructive tribe of Slamtools who made an evil deal with D-Structs

programme.title: Casper's Scare School
programme.desc: Bands on the Run Casper and Jimmy form a rock band to compete in the Deedstown Battle of the Bands. Vote for Casper Mantha is angling to win the office of Class Rep, but Kibosh fancies having a fellow ghost in power.

programme.title: Casper's Scare School
programme.desc: Permission Impossible When Ra's parents refuse to let him go on the school camping trip, he sneaks away and gets lost in the Scary Woods with Casper and Mantha. What Possessed You? When a lesson in taking possession of a human body goes awry, Casper's human ends up taking possession of him!

programme.title: Rupert Bear
programme.desc: Rupert, Edward and Bill go camping. Rupert is excited at the idea of playing ‘explorers' but as darkness falls the friends are frightened by strange shadows and noises.

programme.title: Rupert Bear
programme.desc: Raggety is getting the wood tidy for the annual visit of the Spring Inspector. If it's not looking its best, Spring won't go ahead and Raggety needs help from Rupert and his friends

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Chef J tells Ollie he cooks with love. Kelp and Ollie set out to make food with love for him. When various food combos fail, Ollie considers giving up, because it isn’t good enough. Kelp goes to his Dad for answers, and two seemingly different ingredients form something magical. / When Cruz is not his usual upbeat self, Kelp tries various ways to cheer him up before realizing the best way to be a good friend is to just sit with him, and let him feel what he’s feeling.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Kelp and Scallop pet-sit Crabby, who acts out until they realize he’s missing home. / Kelp feels like he can’t choose between a celebration on land or under the sea. So he attempts to do both... at the same time!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: When Gabby unboxes a coin purse with kitty coins, it's Store Day in the dollhouse! Gabby and Pandy help out at all the different stores (Cakey's Bakery, Baby Box's Craft Emporium, Kitty Fairy's Flower Shoppe) to earn kitty coins and save up for a melodicat at the Grand Opening of DJ Catnip’s Music Store!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: When Gabby, Pandy and the Gabby Cats prepare for a sleepover in the Garden, they discover Pillow Cat has never been to a sleepover. They help her conquer her fears and enjoy her first sleepover.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: When a litter of hedgehogs are temporarily relocated to the habitat, Alex, Marty, Melman, and Gloria become their “babysitters.” The mischievous hedgies quickly wreak total havoc in the habitat—and worse yet, Alex must sacrifice his plans to crash a photoshoot for the zoo’s pamphlet cover when the baby hedgies find the travel tunnels and sneak out for an urban adventure of their own! After an “Adventures in Babysitting”-style citywide hedgehog chase, our gang—with a newfound sense of responsibility—ultimately locates the hedgehogs and learn that babies can be a lot of work, but also a whole lot of fun. And Alex gets his dream pamphlet cover—surrounded by the adorable baby hedgies!

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: It’s Kate’s birthday and everyone in the habitat has something amazing planned- but Melman’s worried that his homemade/hoof-made gift won’t measure up. While on a no-holds barred quest to get Kate her favorite cupcakes, Melman learns the gift doesn’t matter, as long as it comes from the heart.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go

programme.title: Inside Man
programme.desc: A police detective, a bank robber and a high-power broker enter high-stakes negotiations after the criminal's brilliant heist spirals into a hostage situation.

programme.title: Thoroughly Modern Millie
programme.desc: Elmer Bernstein's score highlights this story of two women who arrive in 1920s New York searching for work and romance.

programme.title: Casablanca
programme.desc: Rick Blaine owns a nightclub in Vichy controlled Casablanca, frequented by refugees desperate to escape German domination. Despite the ever-present human misery, Rick manages to remain uninvolved in World War II now raging across Europe and Northern Africa. But all that changes when Ilsa Lund walks through the front door of Rick's club. Rick must now choose between a life with the woman he loves and becoming the hero that both she and the world need.

programme.title: The Tourist
programme.desc: Revolves around Frank, an American tourist visiting Italy to mend a broken heart. Elise is an extraordinary woman who deliberately crosses his path.

programme.title: Daredevil
programme.desc: A lawyer blinded by radioactive waste fights crime as an acrobatic martial arts superhero, using his other senses, which have been enhanced.

programme.title: Salt
programme.desc: A beautiful CIA officer accused of being a Russian spy must go on the run to clear her name and identify a would-be presidential assassin.

programme.title: Road House (1989)
programme.desc: A legendary bouncer comes to restore order at a notorious bar but runs afoul of a ruthless crime boss who controls the town.

programme.title: Grade 2 Math
programme.desc: Study how to divide whole numbers up to 1000 including money and unit fractions. Learn more about straight and curved lines, flat and curved surfaces, and basic shapes and continuous patterns using two attributes.

programme.title: Grade 2 English
programme.desc: Discover what are word clines, synonyms, and antonyms. Identify major points and key themes in a story, and the difference between what is made-up and real in texts.

programme.title: Grade 2 Araling Panlipunan
programme.desc: Alamin ang kahalagahan ng mabuting paglilingkod ng mga namumuno sa pagsulong ng mga pangunahing hanapbuhay at pagtugon sa pangangailangan ng mga kasapi ng sariling komunidad.

programme.title: Grade 3 Filipino
programme.desc: Pag-aralan ang tambalang salita, pandiwa, pang-abay, at pang-ukol. Alamin kung paano magbigay ng sariling ideya, hinuha, pangunahin at sumusuportang kaisipan, tungkol sa kuwentong napakinggan.

programme.title: Grade 3 Math
programme.desc: Identify which fractions are proper and improper, similar and dissimilar and equivalent. Learn more about lines and symmetrical designs, continuous and repeating patterns, and mathematical sentences involving multiplication and division of whole numbers.

programme.title: Grade 3 English
programme.desc: Study what are homonyms, homographs, and hyponyms. Know more about the elements of a story, how to write it, and how to compare and contrast its information, alongside learning about words, phrases, and sentences with long vowels.

programme.title: Grade 3 Araling Panlipunan
programme.desc: Unawain at pahalagahan ang pagkakakilanlang kultural ng kinabibilangang rehiyon.

programme.title: Grade 3 Science
programme.desc: Discover how objects perform motion, and learn about the source of light, sound, heat and electricity, along with their uses.

programme.title: Grade 5 Filipino
programme.desc: Alamin ang wastong pagamit ng mga pang-abay, pang-uri, pang-angkop, pangatnig, salitang naglalarawan. Aralin kung paano magsulat ng pangungusap, talata, at balita, at kung paano magsuri ng mga kuwento at mga pahayag.

programme.title: Grade 5 Math
programme.desc: Discover what are percents, polygons, circles, solid figures, sequences, time, circumference, and how to solve simple equations.

programme.title: Grade 5 English
programme.desc: Differentiate the various text-types and know how to summarize them, as well as how to make a stand and provide evidences supporting opinions or facts.

programme.title: Grade 5 Araling Panlipunan
programme.desc: Matuto tungkol sa mga pagbabago sa lipunan ng sinaunang Pilipino kabilang ang pagpupunyagi ng ilang pangkat na mapanatili ang kalayaan sa Kolonyalismong Espanyol at ang impluwensya nito sa kasalukuyan.

programme.title: Grade 5 Science
programme.desc: Learn more about motion in terms of distance and time, alongside how objects and people interact and are affected by light, sound, and heat, and electricity. Discover the relationship of electricity and magnetism in electromagnets, and what simple DC circuits are.

programme.title: Grade 7 Filipino
programme.desc: Maliwanagan kung ano ang suprasegmental, pagbubuod, pagsusuri at paghahambing ng iba't ibang uri ng panitikan, at kung paano gamitin ang angkop na pahayag at panadang anaporik at kataporik na pangngalan.

programme.title: Grade 7 Math
programme.desc: Identify the key concepts of geometry of shapes and sizes, and geometric relationships.

programme.title: Grade 7 English
programme.desc: Learn how to use multimedia resources and oral language when giving information, and how to express one's belief, cite evidence, and reign in thoughts in public forums.

programme.title: Grade 7 Araling Panlipunan
programme.desc: Alamin ang mga pagbabago, pag-unlad at pagpapatuloy sa Timog at Kanlurang Asya sa transisyonal at makabagong panahon (ika-16 hanggang ika-20 siglo).

programme.title: Grade 7 Science
programme.desc: Know more about motion in one dimension, waves as a carrier of energy, and the characteristics of light, alongside the different charging processes and how heat is transferred.

programme.desc: Learn about the concept of size, length, weight, time, and money. Study how children can take care of themselves and understand the objects in the environment and their attributes.

programme.title: Grade 8 Filipino
programme.desc: Alamin kung paano magsuri at maghambing ng iba't ibang uri ng panitikan, kung ano ang mga estratehiya sa pagkuha ng impormasyon, paano wastong gamitin ang impormal na komunikasyon, at ang angkop na ekspresyon sa pagbabahagi ng ideya o opinyon tungkol sa mga tekstong nabasa.

programme.title: Grade 8 Science
programme.desc: Learn more about the particle nature of matter as a basis for explaining properties, physical changes, and structure of substances and mixtures. programme.title: Aunty Lee's Deadly Delights - EP 74
programme.desc: As Aunty Lee and the gang grapple with Theresa’s troubling situation, Aunty Lee’s kaypoh nature lead her to reveal something to Noel that she shouldn’t — and Cherril is furious.

programme.title: Sullivan's Crossing S1 - EP 4
programme.desc: Maggie and Cal work against the clock in a daring medical rescue, and in the process discover a clue to the whereabouts of a missing camper. Maggie learns a little more about Cal's past, while Sully receives disturbing news

programme.title: Wheel Of Fortune S42 - EP 144
programme.desc: Ryan Seacrest takes over as the new host for the well-loved gameshow.

programme.title: Starstruck UK S2 - EP 6
programme.desc: Starstruck UK Series 2 features members of the public transforming into their favorite pop star lookalikes, with a new judge, Shania Twain, joining the panel alongside Adam Lambert, Beverley Knight, and Jason Manford. Hosted by Olly Murs.

programme.title: Raid The Cage : Season 01 - EP 5
programme.desc: Two teams of two compete to take prizes from the Cage before the time limit expires and the doors close. Correct answers adds seconds to the clock, allowing to claim more rewards from the Cage. The winning team keeps what they grabbed.

programme.title: Weather Gone Viral S8 - EP 10
programme.desc: From whirling tornadoes to torrential rains, to harrowing hurricanes, Weather Gone Viral gives viewers unprecedented access to some of the most insane meteorological moments from around the world. Featuring videos of the most extreme and destructive weather conditions, firsthand accounts, and professional meteorologists sharing tales from the front lines, viewers get to experience the fury of Mother Nature.

programme.title: The Chefs' Line - Series 1 - EP 49
programme.desc: Every top restaurant has a line of chefs leading to the top, from the Commis chef to the Head chef. This celebratory cooking competition pitches at-home cooking enthusiasts against professionals, starting at the bottom and working their way up. Can they beat their way to the top of The Chef’s Line?

programme.title: Mark Moriarty: Off Duty Chef - Series 3 - EP 6
programme.desc: From how to cook fish perfectly to balancing flavours and reimagining leftovers to save money and reduce waste, the new series will see Mark share a whole new set of recipes.

programme.title: The Contenders 26 - EP 8
programme.desc: Egypt and Mohamed Salah have the potential to surprise, Luis Diaz is a thrilling prospect for Colombia, while AFC powerhouses South Korea and Iran will be aiming to go deep.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! Duel Monsters - EP 64
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! follows the adventures of high school student Yugi, who has a magical secret that comes to life when he plays his favorite card game.

programme.title: Piripenguins - EP 9
programme.desc: Follow five fun-loving penguins—Nugget, Pancake, Looph, Brinicle, and Flutter—living life to the fullest on their very own remote iceberg. Comedic adventures see the colony facing everyday challenges in their frosty world and learning invaluable lessons about friendship, teamwork, and self-discovery.

programme.title: Ollie And Friends S7 - EP 3

They decide to join in the fun, adding their own terrifying alien twist to the festivities --- a special monster egg!

programme.title: Pinkfong Songs & Stories - EP 138

programme.title: Bluey: Sr1 - EP 38
programme.desc: Bluey's having fun copying everything Dad says and does, but the game takes a serious turn when Bluey finds a hurt budgie and they have to make an emergency trip to the vet.

programme.title: 123 Number Squad S3 - EP 7
programme.desc: Former champ Farmer Haywire challenges Mr. Mengo to a game but lacks 10 pins and needs help to keep score! Mr. Mengo accidentally grows a 5-beanstalk-high magical beanstalk, trapping a gnome at the top. He seeks help as his magic is depleted. With each beanstalk at 5 meters, calculate the total height to rescue George!
